testcase.name: Story 3.4 - P0: Real-Time Display Critical Path › P0-E2E-001: Should display new subscription immediately after add (< 100ms)
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › story-3-4-sorting.spec.ts:84:3 › Story 3.4 - P0: Real-Time Display Critical Path › P0-E2E-001: Should display new subscription immediately after add (< 100ms)
Error: expect(received).toBeLessThan(expected)
Expected: < 150 Received: 277
98 | const actualTime = afterTime - beforeTime; 99 | console.log(`📊 Real-time update took: ${actualTime}ms`); > 100 | expect(actualTime).toBeLessThan(150); | ^ 101 | 102 | // ASSERTION: Empty state is gone 103 | await expect(emptyState).not.toBeVisible(); at C:\Users\Lester Tuazon\Documents\GitHub\BMad-subscription-tracker\subscription-tracker\tests\e2e\story-3-4-sorting.spec.ts:100:24
